task: Fix Price Ingestion & P&L (P0-P2): Kalshi WS zero-default bug, bid/ask confusion, zero-price guard, DB mode tracking, fee modeling

summary: Phase 1 P0 fixes complete. All 3 workers ran in parallel.

details.forensics: 100% of $49.30 profit is phantom from zero-default prices. 0 legitimate opportunities exist.

summary: F1 blocking finding fixed: best_bid/best_ask now return Option<Decimal>, to_price_update returns Option<PriceUpdate>. Empty book sides no longer leak Decimal::ZERO into price cache.

findings_fixed: pre-existing clippy warning in auth.rs fixed
findings_deferred: F2: cents fallback semantic inconsistency (low impact, no_price cents field is valid fallback)
details.verification: cargo build OK, cargo test 179/179, cargo clippy clean

summary: Phase 2 complete: P1 mode tracking + P2 fee modeling. All DB writes now tagged with trading mode. Fee-aware detector, tracker computes net profit after fees, daily P&L aggregation uses actual fees.

p2_fee_modeling.tracker: computes net_profit = gross - kalshi_fee - poly_fee per position
p2_fee_modeling.detector: fee-adjusted min spread: effective_min = min_spread_absolute + estimated_round_trip_fees
p2_fee_modeling.daily_pnl: reconstructs gross/fees/net from positions instead of hardcoding ZERO

details.verification: cargo build OK, cargo test 184/184, cargo clippy clean

summary: F1 blocking finding RESOLVED. best_bid/best_ask return Option<Decimal>, to_price_update returns Option<PriceUpdate>. No more zero leakage. 179 tests pass.
P1+P2 approved. 3 advisory items: mode should become enum, fee model overestimates (safe direction), get_daily_pnl lacks mode filter. 184 tests pass, clippy clean.
